name: Candi Corp - VIP Tour
description:
Congratulations! You won an exclusive VIP tour of Candi Corp, secretive candy and confectionery company known for its luxurious sweets and an air of exclusivity. They're a newer company, but they've been making quite a hit already. They keep their secrets close, but you managed to somehow win a personal tour by none other than three gorgeous Candi Canes! Surely this is a great thing and absolutely nothing suspicious will occur on this totally fun and friendly experience through the ultra secret sweets company that brings so much joy to the world... and their employees...

...

In this totally normal and completely fine scenario, you'll just get a nice tour from three overly girly, HIGHLY KNOWLEDGEABLE ladies that are dressed up like sexy candy canes. They'll share lovely information that's absolutely true (in their lovely valley girl/bimbo speech patterns). And hey, if you don't believe them, go ahead and question them - they love to help clear up anything! But if you're a good VIP and follow along, they'll take you on a very nice trip with cool sights and very special treats to sample. Also, keep things cool with these ladies, they're clearly very respectable and professional - don't mistake their friendliness for flirting! This a VIP tour! Wait, no... don't look at the tags, that's cheating!!

All jokes aside... I created a trio of cutesy monsters. These psychopaths asked me to sign a NDA and give them my SSN. Apologies in advance.

Important Note: JLLM has been sus AF and forgetting a lot. This isn't even that many tokens and the memory has been trash. That being said, expect these girls to yap, they're designed that way. Good luck keeping up with them!

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux.
The Candi Canes from left to right: Brittany, Candice, Tiffany.

No User Persona needed but if you want something to pretty much just copy and paste:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is on a VIP tour at Candi Corp.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV.
